header.dataFromCache: Local cache — use Download to update
header.downloadPatchesFirstRunHint: Click here to download patches on first launch
header.downloadPreviousPatchesWarning: Experimental mode: buff/nerf detection may be inaccurate on older patches and can behave unstably.
header.resetDbHint: Remove downloaded patch notes from the local DB (icon catalog and augment cache are kept)
header.initialBootHint: Downloading the latest patch and icons. This usually takes up to a minute.

toasts.patchNotCached: Nothing in cache. Download patches from the header button.
toasts.resetManual: Restart the app manually if needed.
toasts.ddragonRunesItemsError: Could not load runes/items from Data Dragon

settings.title: Settings
settings.singleBlockDescription: Quick panel for interface, startup, window behavior, data, and service actions.
settings.languageHint: Changes UI language and tray menu labels.
settings.patchDefaultHint: Defines which patch is opened on app start.
settings.startupRouteHint: Choose the first screen after launch.
settings.closeOnXHint: Quit fully exits the process. Hide to tray keeps the app running in the background.
settings.minimizeButtonHint: If set to tray, minimizing sends the window to the notification area instead of the taskbar.
settings.autostartHint: Automatically start the app when signing into Windows.
settings.dateFormatHint: How dates are displayed in lists and history.
settings.dataLocationHint: Moving the database file manually is not supported.

dialogs.resetDbDesc: Delete only saved patch notes (and skin spotlight cache) from the local database. CDragon catalog, wiki augment cache, and game assets metadata stay. This cannot be undone.

tier.title: Tier list
tier.subtitle: Ranking by net balance changes from cached patch notes. Click a row to open history.
tier.historyRange: Top changes from patch {{newest}} to patch {{oldest}} ({{count}} patches).
tier.debugVersionsTitle: Debug: versions used in current tier window
tier.noHistoryData: No buff/nerf entries in the selected window.
tier.noData: No data. Download patches from the server and refresh the cache.

history.pageIntro: Pick a champion, rune, or item — we show a 20-patch summary and per-patch entries.
history.title: Change history
history.noData: No data. Use “Download patches” in the header or pick another entity.

patchView.noLocalPatches: No patch notes in the local database. Use Download in the header.

empty.default: Pick a patch above and press Refresh to load notes.

augments.title: Augments (Arena & ARAM Mayhem)
augments.subtitle: Bundled League Wiki module + category icons (offline JSON in the repo).
augments.tableHint: Description is wiki HTML; wiki icon first, then Community Dragon from catalog when available.
augments.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, tier, set, text…
augments.noSearchResults: No matches — clear search or change the query.
augments.bundleEmpty: Bundle is empty. Maintainer: run `cd src-tauri && cargo run --bin wiki_augment_fetch`, commit `src/data/augments-bundled.json`.
augments.poolEmpty: No augments in this pool in the current bundle.
augments.bundleLoadError: Could not load augment bundle JSON.

community.title: Community
community.subtitle: Bugfix showcases and skin spotlights from YouTube (RSS, no API key).
community.youtubeTauriOnly: YouTube feeds load inside the desktop app (Tauri).
community.matchHint: Likely match for upcoming skin titles
